sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_snowflake (id UInt64, timestamp DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_snowflake SET timestamp = snowflakeIDToDateTime(7204436857747984384) WHERE id = 7204436857747984384;
SELECT id, snowflakeIDToDateTime(id) AS converted_timestamp FROM test_snowflake WHERE id > 7200000000000000000;
